title: Joined by Assemblymember Eduardo Garcia, Rivas calls for urgent action to protect farmworkers and avoid disruptions in food supply
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California farms are facing labor shortages due to the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "Many of California's farmworkers lack access to health care.",
    "California's agriculture industry is valued at $50 billion.",
    "Farmworkers are designated as an essential infrastructure workforce by Governor Newsom.",
    "Farmworkers often live and work in crowded conditions that make them vulnerable to contracting COVID-19.",
    "The California Farmworker COVID-19 Relief Package aims to expand paid sick leave for farmworkers from 3 days to 2 weeks.",
    "The relief package provides for supplemental hazard pay to compensate farmworkers for increased health and child care costs.",
    "The relief package allocates subsidies to private child care providers for farmworker children.",
    "The comprehensive Cal/OSHA guidance mandates agricultural businesses to provide face masks and personal protective equipment to workers.",
    "The relief package funds public service announcements to educate farmworkers on COVID-19 guidelines in both English and Spanish.",
    "The package provides temporary housing for agricultural workers to allow for social distancing.",
    "A comprehensive survey of farmworker housing conditions will be authorized to ensure their health and safety.",
    "The Agriculture Labor Shortage and Overtime Act provides an agricultural overtime tax credit to mitigate labor shortages.",
    "The Telehealth and e-Consult Services Act aims to deploy telehealth services for rural and community hospitals.",
    "The Moderate Income Housing Act streamlines the approval process for smaller housing developments for farm workers and lower income residents.",
    "The Access to Justice and Electronic Court Filings Act expands the availability of electronic filing to all state trial courts."
  ]
}
```
